code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let t = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let body = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(body)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut token = ""
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(body, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if is_ws(b)
      if token == t
        count = count + 1
      end
      token = ""
    else
      token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if token == t
    count = count + 1
  end
  println("count=#{count}")
end
